mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, house_id, score, move_in_date, user_name, department, title_level, family_size, house_title, house_area, rent_amount FROM housing_record
SELECT id, user_id, house_id, score, move_in_date, user_name, department, title_level, family_size, house_title, house_area, rent_amount FROM housing_record WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO housing_record(user_id, house_id, score, move_in_date, user_name, department, title_level, family_size, house_title, house_area, rent_amount) VALUES (#{userId}, #{houseId}, #{score}, #{moveInDate}, #{userName}, #{department}, #{titleLevel}, #{familySize}, #{houseTitle}, #{houseArea}, #{rentAmount})
